command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== pip availability ==="
which pip3 python3 2>/dev/null
python3 -m pip --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no pip module"

echo "=== Install via ensurepip if needed, then the lib ==="
sudo apt-get install -y python3-pip -q 2>&1 | tail -2 || python3 -m ensurepip 2>&1 | tail -2

echo "=== Now install uptime-kuma-api ==="
python3 -m pip install uptime-kuma-api --break-system-packages -q 2>&1 | tail -3
python3 -c "import uptime_kuma_api; print('lib OK:', uptime_kuma_api.__version__)" 2>&1 | tail -2
REMOTE
